text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The summer camp has arrived once again. A
chance encounter with Maruzensky gives Grass
Wonder the opportunity to speak with her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a brief exchange, Maruzensky leaves. Her
shadow looms large in Grass Wonder's eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Grass Wonder has grown much over the
past year. And she isn't finished yet, so let's start
this summer camp!
